case_title: STONICH, FRANK vs. WOLDEN, CARL et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT WOLDEN, SHELBIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES AS TO DEFENDANT WOLDEN, CARL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLDEN, CARL WOLDEN, SHELBIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1328 SAN BRUNO AVE. #1, SF,CA. $2,338.06 RENT, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,858.06, STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT SAYED TO 5PM, 2-15-94. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY WITH NO FURTHER STAYS.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT WOLDEN, CARL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT WOLDEN, CARL

DEPT. 3, JUDGE J. ORR, CSR S.NAYLOR, CLERK E.MONTI 3:10 PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ARNOLD EVJE, COUNSEL APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT: PLTF TO HAVE R&P OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1328 SAN BRUNO AVE.#1,SF. LEASE & SEC DEPOSIT FORFEITED. PLTF IS AWARDED $2338.06 RENT/DAMAGES, AND ATTY FEES OF $520.00. COSTS WAIVED. WRIT TO ISSUE IMME- DIATELY BUT STAYED TO 2-15-94, 5PM. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY WITH NO FURTHER STAYS. ANY PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED. ANY FURTHER CLAIMS WAIVED & EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. NO OTHER OCCUPANTS RESIDE AT PROPERTY.
